823.reason: [This condition is insufficient: it assumes that any token sequence where the third token is '(' must be a FuncDef, but doesn't verify that the first token is a valid FuncType (VOIDTK/INTTK/CHARTK). This can misclassify variable declarations or other constructs as function definitions if they coincidentally have '(' two tokens ahead.]

824.reason: [This check is incorrect because it assumes the current token (index) is 'int' but doesn't verify it. According to the grammar, MainFuncDef must start with 'int main()', so we need to check that words[index].code == INTTK and words[index+1].code == MAINTK, not just check the content of index+1.]
